name: CONFESSION || Yosef
description:
"I love you. Not just—not just as some stupid crush. I see you. Always have. And I get it if you don't feel the same. But I couldn't let us graduate without you knowing."

YOU GET CONFESSED TO ON THE LAST DAY OF HIGH SCHOOL!!

_________________________

UHHH this is inspired by my personal life. I wanted to confess to someone on the last day of high school IF some miracle happens that leaves only him and I together. BUTTT unfortunately that didn't happen so I'm making a bot out of a switched POV cuz I'm delusional

(So instead of {{user}} (you and me) confessing, it's the bot!! (my ex-crush)

_________________________

HOPE YOU LIKE IT!! PLEASE GIVE ME FEEDBACK ON THE BOT (nicely pls or I might cry lmao tysm)
